title: Taimako da Tallafawa
description: Muna nan don taimakawa da kowace tambaya ko batutuwa da za ku iya fuskanta yayin amfani da aikace-aikacen yanar gizon mu. Ko kuna buƙatar taimako don farawa, kuna da tambaya game da fasali, ko kuna son bayar da rahoton bug, muna nan don taimakawa.

contact.title: Tuntuɓi Support
contact.emailDesc: Muna nufin amsa duk imel a cikin sa'o'i 24.
contact.footer: Mun gode da zaɓar aikace-aikacen yanar gizon mu. Mun himmatu don sanya kwarewarku ta zama santsi da jin daɗi sosai.

detailedFeatures.title: Cikakken Taimakon Siffar
detailedFeatures.subtitle: Rushewar damar shigar da murya da rubutu-zuwa-Magana kowace na'ura.
